title: Skip onboarding immediately and land on Login
description: Verifies a user can skip onboarding from the first screen and is taken to the login screen.

title: Retry on onboarding asset load error then skip to Login
description: Verifies that when an onboarding asset fails to load, an error placeholder is shown, Retry is available, and Skip still navigates to Login.

steps.description: Verify element "Onboarding asset error placeholder" is visible

title: Complete a standard POS sale from product browse to payment screen
description: Verifies a cashier can browse products, add to cart, adjust quantity, apply a discount, hold the invoice, and proceed to the payment screen.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on the first visible product in the product list/grid
Verify element "Cart items list" is visible
Click on "+" (increase quantity) for the first cart item
Type "5" into the discount value field

title: Search products by name and add a result to the cart
description: Verifies searching by product name returns results and a product can be added to the cart from search results.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on the product search field
Type "milk" into the product search field
Verify element "Search results list" is visible
Click on the first product in the search results
Verify element "Cart items list" is visible

title: Browse products by category and ensure product list updates
description: Verifies switching categories changes the visible product list on the POS screen.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on the first product category chip/tab
Click on a different product category chip/tab

title: Adjust cart item quantity down to minimum and verify it does not go negative
description: Verifies decreasing item quantity stops at the minimum allowed (e.g., 1) and does not display invalid quantity.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on the first visible product in the product list/grid
Verify element "Cart items list" is visible
Click on "-" (decrease quantity) for the first cart item
Click on "-" (decrease quantity) for the first cart item

title: Apply a percentage discount and verify discount is shown on the cart/summary
description: Verifies a discount can be applied and the UI reflects the discount in the order summary before payment.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on the first visible product in the product list/grid
Select "Percentage" from the discount type dropdown
Type "10" into the discount value field

title: Hold an invoice and verify it appears in Hold Invoices list
description: Verifies a cart can be held and is visible in the held invoices list for later retrieval.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on the first visible product in the product list/grid
Verify element "Held invoices list" is visible

title: Search with no matching products shows 'No products found' message
description: Verifies the POS search displays a clear empty state when no products match the query.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on the product search field
Type "zzzz-nonexistent-item" into the product search field
Verify text "No products found" is visible

title: Barcode scanner flow: Product not found then quick-add a product and add it to cart
description: Verifies scanning an unknown barcode shows 'Product not found', then a new product can be created via quick add and added to the cart.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on the barcode input field
Type "0000000000000" into the barcode input field
Verify text "Product not found" is visible
Type "New Test Product" into the product name field
Click on the product search field
Type "New Test Product" into the product search field
Click on "New Test Product" in the results
Verify element "Cart items list" is visible

title: Sales History: View sales list and open a sale detail

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Click on the first store in the store list
Click on "Sales" in the main navigation

description: Verifies that applying a date filter updates the visible sales list accordingly.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Click on the first store in the store list
Click on "Sales" in the main navigation
Click on the date filter control

title: Sales History: Open sale detail and verify totals and payment method are visible
description: Verifies that the sale detail view displays the sale totals and payment method information.

Click on the first store in the store list
Click on "Sales" in the main navigation
Click on the first sale in the sales list

title: Sales History: Reprint receipt from sale detail and confirm print preview/confirmation
description: Verifies a user can initiate receipt reprint from sale detail and reach the reprint screen to confirm.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Click on the first store in the store list
Click on "Sales" in the main navigation
Click on the first sale in the sales list

description: Verifies a cashier can start the product exchange flow for a sale and reach the exchange screen.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Click on the first store in the store list
Click on "Sales" in the main navigation
Click on the first sale in the sales list
Click on the "Exchange" or "Process exchange" button

title: Sales History: Apply date filter that yields no results and verify empty state message
description: Verifies the UI shows an empty state message when the selected date period has no sales.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Click on the first store in the store list
Click on "Sales" in the main navigation
Click on the date filter control
Select "Custom" from the date range dropdown
Verify text "No sales for selected period" is visible

Click on "Customers" in the main navigation/menu

Click on "Customers" in the main navigation/menu

Type "a" into the customer search field

description: Verifies manual transaction form shows visible validation when attempting to save without required inputs.

steps.description: Click on a store from the store list
Click on "Customers" in the main navigation/menu
Click on the first customer in the customer list

description: Verifies that searching for a non-existent customer shows an empty state and provides a create-new action.

Click on "Customers" in the main navigation/menu
Type "zzzz-no-such-customer" into the customer search field

description: Verifies the create-customer form enforces phone requirement and can be saved after correcting inputs.

title: Apply interest to customer balance from customer accounts area
description: Verifies the apply-interest screen can be opened and shows the interest application UI.

title: Add stock to an inventory item and verify stock level updates in list
description: Verifies a cashier can add stock for a selected product and see the updated stock level reflected back in the inventory list.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on the "Inventory" section in the main navigation

title: Add stock: select product, add quantity, confirm, and verify updated stock is visible
description: Verifies the full add-stock workflow: select an item, add quantity, confirm, and see the updated stock on return to the inventory list.

Click on the "Inventory" section in the main navigation
Click on the first product row in the inventory list

description: Verifies adding stock with a valid quantity completes successfully and the inventory list shows the new stock value for that item.

Click on the first product row in the inventory list

title: Transfer stock shows 'Invalid destination' then succeeds after correction
description: Verifies transfer validation: submitting with an invalid destination shows the expected error, then correcting destination allows successful transfer.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on the "Inventory" section in the main navigation
Click on the first product row in the inventory list

title: Transfer stock: submit invalid destination and verify validation message is visible
description: Verifies the transfer form blocks submission with an invalid destination and displays the 'Invalid destination' validation error.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on the "Inventory" section in the main navigation
Click on the first product row in the inventory list
Fill "2" into the transfer quantity field
Select "Invalid destination" from the destination location dropdown

title: Transfer stock: correct destination and submit successfully
description: Verifies that after correcting the destination location, the transfer submits successfully and the user returns to inventory context.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on the "Inventory" section in the main navigation
Click on the first product row in the inventory list
Fill "2" into the transfer quantity field
Select "Invalid destination" from the destination location dropdown
Select "Main Store" from the destination location dropdown

title: Remove stock: open remove screen and verify required UI elements are visible
description: Verifies the remove stock flow is accessible from an inventory item and the remove form is displayed.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on the "Inventory" section in the main navigation
Click on the first product row in the inventory list

title: Wastage: record wastage with valid quantity and verify success return
description: Verifies a cashier can record product wastage with a valid quantity and is returned to inventory context after submission.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on the "Inventory" section in the main navigation
Fill "1" into the wastage quantity field

title: Stock take: start physical stock count and verify stock take screen loads
description: Verifies the stock-take workflow is accessible and the stock-take screen is displayed for counting inventory.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on the "Inventory" section in the main navigation

title: Low-stock alerts: verify inventory alerts section is visible from inventory list
description: Verifies low-stock alerts are visible from the inventory list screen when the alerts UI is present.

Click on the "Inventory" section in the main navigation
Scroll to the "Low Stock Alerts" section

title: Quick Add creates a new product and it appears in the products catalog
description: Verifies a cashier can create a new product via Quick Add and see it listed in the catalog.

Type "E2E Test Product" into the product name field
Verify text "E2E Test Product" is visible

title: Quick Add validation: missing required fields prevents saving
description: Verifies the Quick Add form blocks saving when required fields are missing and shows an on-screen validation message.

description: Verifies the barcode field can be filled and saved when other required fields are present.

Type "Barcode Product" into the product name field

title: Edit product selling price updates the displayed price in the catalog
description: Verifies a cashier can open the edit price screen for a product and the new price is reflected in the UI.

Click on the "Edit Price" button/menu item
Fill "9.99" into the selling price field

title: Edit price validation: non-numeric price shows an error and does not save
description: Verifies the edit price form rejects invalid price input and displays a visible validation message.

Click on the "Edit Price" button/menu item
Fill "abc" into the selling price field

description: Verifies a cashier can create a new product category and it appears in the category management screen.

Click on the "Print Barcode" button/menu item

Verify text "Printing preview available; physical printing disabled on web" is visible

title: Generate price label sheets and verify a preview is shown
description: Verifies the user can open the price labels feature, generate labels, and see a visible preview/result screen.

title: Open a new shift with an opening cash amount
description: Verifies a cashier can log in, reach Shifts, and open a shift by entering an opening cash amount.

Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the OTP or password field
Click on "Shifts" in the main navigation

description: Verifies the shift open screen accepts an opening cash amount and confirms shift opening.

Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the OTP or password field
Click on "Shifts" in the main navigation
Type "100" into the "Opening cash" amount field

title: Opening cash validation for empty or invalid amount
description: Verifies opening a shift is blocked and a visible validation message appears when opening cash is invalid.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the phone or username field
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the OTP or password field
Click on "Shifts" in the main navigation

title: Navigate to Users & Permissions for manager discrepancy resolution
description: Verifies a manager can reach the Users & Permissions screen from Settings to resolve shift discrepancy approval tasks.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the phone or username field
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the OTP or password field
Click on "Settings" in the main navigation

title: Generate Daily Sales report with date range and view payment breakdown
description: Verifies a cashier can generate the Daily Sales report for a chosen date range and view payment breakdown by method.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on "Reports" in the main navigation menu
Select "Daily Sales" from the report type dropdown

title: Daily Sales report validation: end date earlier than start date shows an error
description: Verifies the report screen blocks generation or shows an error when an invalid date range is selected.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on "Reports" in the main navigation menu
Select "Daily Sales" from the report type dropdown
Select a start date that is later than the end date
Verify text "Invalid date range" is visible

title: Daily Sales report with no data returns an empty-state message
description: Verifies the report shows a clear empty state when the selected date range has no sales data.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on "Reports" in the main navigation menu
Select "Daily Sales" from the report type dropdown
Select a date range far in the past

title: Open Custom Report Builder from Reports and generate with multiple filters
description: Verifies a cashier can open the custom report builder and run a report after adding multiple filters.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on "Reports" in the main navigation menu
Select "Date" from the filter field dropdown
Type a valid start date into the start date field
Type a valid end date into the end date field
Select "Payment method" from the filter field dropdown

title: Custom report heavy query shows 'Report generation failed' and Retry works
description: Verifies the custom report builder shows a failure message for a heavy query and allows retrying generation.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on "Reports" in the main navigation menu
Select "Date" from the filter field dropdown
Type a very wide start date into the start date field
Type today's date into the end date field
Select "Product" from the filter field dropdown
Type a broad value like "a" into the value field
Verify text "Report generation failed" is visible

title: Custom report failure can be resolved by reducing filters and regenerating
description: Verifies a user can reduce filter complexity after a failure and successfully generate a custom report.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on "Reports" in the main navigation menu
Select "Date" from the filter field dropdown
Type a very wide start date into the start date field
Type today's date into the end date field
Verify text "Report generation failed" is visible
Verify text "No filters applied" is visible
Select "Date" from the filter field dropdown

title: Refund an item from an existing sale and complete return receipt flow
description: Verifies a cashier can find an original sale, select return items, choose a reason, process a refund to the original payment method, and reach the return receipt screen.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on "Returns" in the main navigation/menu

title: Locate original sale from Returns screen using search
description: Verifies the original sale can be searched and selected from the Returns screen.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on "Returns" in the main navigation/menu
Type "INV" into the "Search sale" / "Invoice" search field

title: Select items to return from the original sale details
description: Verifies the user can select one or more items from a sale for return processing.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on "Returns" in the main navigation/menu
Click on the first sale result in the search results list

title: Choose a return reason before refund processing
description: Verifies a return reason can be selected and is required prior to completing a refund.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on "Returns" in the main navigation/menu
Click on the first sale result in the search results list
Click on the checkbox/toggle for the first item to return
Select "Damaged" from the return reason dropdown

title: Process refund to the original payment method and show return receipt
description: Verifies refund completion to original payment method and successful navigation to the return receipt screen.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on "Returns" in the main navigation/menu
Click on the first sale result in the search results list
Click on the checkbox/toggle for the first item to return
Select "Not needed" from the return reason dropdown
Click on "Refund to original payment method"

title: Validate refund amount cannot exceed original amount
description: Verifies that entering a refund amount greater than the original amount shows the validation error.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on "Returns" in the main navigation/menu
Click on the first sale result in the search results list
Click on the checkbox/toggle for the first item to return
Verify text "Refund exceeds original amount" is visible

title: Correct an excessive refund amount and proceed successfully
description: Verifies the user can fix an excessive refund value to a valid amount and the validation error disappears allowing continuation.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on "Returns" in the main navigation/menu
Click on the first sale result in the search results list
Click on the checkbox/toggle for the first item to return
Verify text "Refund exceeds original amount" is visible
Click on "Refund to original payment method"

title: Attempt to proceed without selecting any items to return
description: Verifies the system prevents processing a return when no items are selected and shows a visible message.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on "Returns" in the main navigation/menu
Click on the first sale result in the search results list
Click on "Refund to original payment method"
Verify text "Select items to return" is visible

title: Attempt to process return without selecting a return reason
description: Verifies the system requires a return reason before refund processing and shows a visible message.

steps.description: Click on the first available store in the store list
Click on "Returns" in the main navigation/menu
Click on the first sale result in the search results list
Click on the checkbox/toggle for the first item to return
Click on "Refund to original payment method"
Verify text "Return reason is required" is visible
